attacking_style: Not an attacker. Pure domestique role focused on sustained tempo riding on climbs and rolling terrain to control gaps and set up team leaders.
team_tactics: Deployed on penultimate climbs to set tempo and erode breakaway advantages, preserving energy of team leaders for final effort. Classic Sky train methodology.
terrain_preference: Rolling terrain and sustained climbs where diesel engine capabilities shine. Excels at tempo work that can erase significant time gaps through power output rather than acceleration.
vulnerability: Technical descents and corner transitions show exposure, with crash history at predictable technical sections suggesting limited bike handling or insufficient course reconnaissance.
key_patterns: Penultimate climb tempo setter role, allowing leaders to conserve energy for final ascent (2 observations)
High-power tempo riding on climbs erases substantial gaps efficiently through sustained effort (2 observations)
Technical descent crashes at predictable danger points reveal handling weakness (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: 2018 Giro showed elite diesel engine capability erasing 5-minute gap rapidly, core domestique strength intact
